On Mon, Apr 27, 2009 at 2:10 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of games/mangband,
>
> Please note that PR ports/134052 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/134052
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

Fine with me. The submitter is also welcome to take maintainership if they'd
like. I haven't had much time to work on ports recently.

 -Adam
